step_rationale: Monocyte and leukocyte adhesion via VCAM-1 binding; plaque inflammation.
mechanism: VLA-4 (α4β1 integrin) mediates monocyte adhesion to endothelial VCAM-1, promoting leukocyte recruitment and plaque destabilization.

references.title: On-chip phenotypic analysis of inflammatory monocytes in atherogenesis and myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
